steps.title: Identify the main idea
steps.content: The text says past studies hypothesized PSP was homologous (shared ancestor). Aureliano et al. examined fossils, found contradicting evidence, and concluded PSP "likely evolved independently in each clade."

steps.title: Match to a choice
steps.content:
Choice D captures the full main idea: the team found common ancestors likely lacked PSP, leading them to a different evolutionary origin than past studies proposed.

A and B focus on details; C reverses what "independently" means by truncating the conclusion.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
